metadata.source: CMS via ResDAC (Research Data Assistance Center)
metadata.description: The gold standard for ABA fraud research. Contains all Medicaid/CHIP claims across all states, including ABA therapy codes 97151-97158 and T1024.

step_1.title: Contact ResDAC
step_1.detail: Email resdac@umn.edu or call 888-973-7322. ResDAC staff assist with completing all required forms.

step_2.title: Complete Data Use Agreement (DUA)
step_2.detail: Legal agreement between CMS and your organization documenting terms, privacy and security requirements. Do not sign until directed by ResDAC.

step_3.title: Obtain IRB Approval + HIPAA Waiver
step_3.detail: Your institution's IRB must approve the research. A HIPAA waiver of authorization meeting 45 CFR § 164.512(i)(1)(i) is required.

step_4.title: CMS Privacy Board Review
step_4.detail: CMS Privacy Board reviews the request, followed by a second-level review by the CMS Chief Data Officer.

step_5.title: Access via VRDC
step_5.detail: All research must be conducted in the CCW Virtual Research Data Center (VRDC). CMS is transitioning all research to VRDC starting 2025.

costs.storage: 2 TB included per DUA, additional storage available
costs.note: For grant proposals, email resdac@umn.edu for formal cost estimates

metadata.timeline: 3-5 months from application to data access

taf_file_types.description: All other claims including ABA therapy (outpatient, professional, home health)

aba_relevant_files: TAF Other Services (OT) - contains all ABA outpatient claims
TAF Demographic and Eligibility (DE) - patient demographics
